creator: AnarCat@anarcat.dyndns.org
text:
Argh!

This should obviously not be commented:

--- ecawave.shar.old	Tue Nov 20 12:14:30 2001
+++ ecawave.shar	Tue Nov 20 12:51:47 2001
@@ -62,7 +62,7 @@
 X
 XMAINTAINER=	anarcat@anarcat.dyndns.org
 X
-X#LIB_DEPENDS=	ecasound.7:${PORTSDIR}/audio/ecasound
+XLIB_DEPENDS=	ecasound.7:${PORTSDIR}/audio/ecasound
 X
 XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 XUSE_GMAKE=	yes

Sorry...

A.
